fixes: Expose machine-readable price AND availability per product (feed fields or Offer schema) — agents will not guess stock.
Bring product descriptions to 120+ chars of concrete, quotable substance.
Fill the four required catalog fields on every product: title, image, price, description — a product missing one drops out of agent answers.
Rewrite product titles with literal, matchable language ("insulated 12oz steel bottle"), not marketing names; drop ALL-CAPS and slogan phrasing.

pillars.label: Discover — can agents fetch + read the store?

checks.label: AI crawlers allowed (robots.txt)
checks.detail: No AI shopping crawler is root-blocked in robots.txt.

checks.label: llms.txt present
checks.detail: /llms.txt found.

checks.label: Sitemap discoverable
checks.detail: Sitemap found.

checks.label: Homepage readable without JavaScript
checks.detail: Homepage serves ~2345 visible words of real HTML (no JS needed).

pillars.label: Evaluate — can agents parse + trust the products?

checks.label: Machine-readable product catalog
checks.detail: Open product feed at https://brevite.co/products.json?limit=100 (26 products sampled).

checks.label: Catalog required fields (title/image/price/description)
checks.detail: Coverage over 26 products: title 100% · image 96% · price 100% · description 88% (avg 96%).

checks.label: Title quality (literal, matchable)
checks.detail: 0% of titles carry a literal descriptor/spec; 0% read as marketing slogans.

checks.label: Description depth (≥120 chars)
checks.detail: 88% of products have a description agents can actually quote (≥120 chars).

checks.label: Product JSON-LD (Offer: price/currency/availability)
checks.detail: Complete Product schema (rating schema absent).

pillars.label: Transact — can an agent complete a purchase?

fixes: Add complete Product JSON-LD on product pages: Offer with price + priceCurrency + availability, plus AggregateRating when you have reviews.
Rewrite product titles with literal, matchable language ("insulated 12oz steel bottle"), not marketing names; drop ALL-CAPS and slogan phrasing.

platform.name: shopify
platform.evidence: Open /products.json feed + Shop Pay signals — Shopify storefront; platform ships ChatGPT-checkout (ACP) and Google (UCP) catalog rails for eligible stores.

fixes: Add complete Product JSON-LD on product pages: Offer with price + priceCurrency + availability, plus AggregateRating when you have reviews.
Publish shipping + returns policy pages at stable URLs — agents surface (and protocols require) merchant policies before completing checkout.
Bring product descriptions to 120+ chars of concrete, quotable substance.
Serve real HTML without JavaScript: agent fetchers read the raw response. Pre-render or SSR your storefront.
Fill the four required catalog fields on every product: title, image, price, description — a product missing one drops out of agent answers.
Expose machine-readable price AND availability per product (feed fields or Offer schema) — agents will not guess stock.

platform.name: shopify
platform.evidence: Open /products.json feed — Shopify storefront; platform ships ChatGPT-checkout (ACP) and Google (UCP) catalog rails for eligible stores.

fixes: Unblock AI shopping crawlers in robots.txt (GPTBot, OAI-SearchBot, PerplexityBot, ClaudeBot, Google-Extended…) — blocked agents cannot see, cite, or sell your products.
Serve real HTML without JavaScript: agent fetchers read the raw response. Pre-render or SSR your storefront.
Publish shipping + returns policy pages at stable URLs — agents surface (and protocols require) merchant policies before completing checkout.
Publish /sitemap.xml (and declare it in robots.txt) so agents can enumerate your catalog.
Rewrite product titles with literal, matchable language ("insulated 12oz steel bottle"), not marketing names; drop ALL-CAPS and slogan phrasing.
Add /llms.txt — a short markdown map of your key pages for AI systems (llmstxt.org).

fixes: Add complete Product JSON-LD on product pages: Offer with price + priceCurrency + availability, plus AggregateRating when you have reviews.
Rewrite product titles with literal, matchable language ("insulated 12oz steel bottle"), not marketing names; drop ALL-CAPS and slogan phrasing.

Add /llms.txt — a short markdown map of your key pages for AI systems (llmstxt.org).

platform.name: shopify
platform.evidence: Open /products.json feed — Shopify storefront; platform ships ChatGPT-checkout (ACP) and Google (UCP) catalog rails for eligible stores.

fixes: Serve real HTML without JavaScript: agent fetchers read the raw response. Pre-render or SSR your storefront.
Publish shipping + returns policy pages at stable URLs — agents surface (and protocols require) merchant policies before completing checkout.
Publish /sitemap.xml (and declare it in robots.txt) so agents can enumerate your catalog.
Bring product descriptions to 120+ chars of concrete, quotable substance.
Fill the four required catalog fields on every product: title, image, price, description — a product missing one drops out of agent answers.
Expose machine-readable price AND availability per product (feed fields or Offer schema) — agents will not guess stock.

platform.name: shopify
platform.evidence: Open /products.json feed — Shopify storefront; platform ships ChatGPT-checkout (ACP) and Google (UCP) catalog rails for eligible stores.

fixes: Serve real HTML without JavaScript: agent fetchers read the raw response. Pre-render or SSR your storefront.
Publish shipping + returns policy pages at stable URLs — agents surface (and protocols require) merchant policies before completing checkout.
Publish /sitemap.xml (and declare it in robots.txt) so agents can enumerate your catalog.
Rewrite product titles with literal, matchable language ("insulated 12oz steel bottle"), not marketing names; drop ALL-CAPS and slogan phrasing.
Add /llms.txt — a short markdown map of your key pages for AI systems (llmstxt.org).

Rewrite product titles with literal, matchable language ("insulated 12oz steel bottle"), not marketing names; drop ALL-CAPS and slogan phrasing.
Bring product descriptions to 120+ chars of concrete, quotable substance.

Add complete Product JSON-LD on product pages: Offer with price + priceCurrency + availability, plus AggregateRating when you have reviews.
Rewrite product titles with literal, matchable language ("insulated 12oz steel bottle"), not marketing names; drop ALL-CAPS and slogan phrasing.

platform.name: shopify
platform.evidence: Open /products.json feed — Shopify storefront; platform ships ChatGPT-checkout (ACP) and Google (UCP) catalog rails for eligible stores.

fixes: Bring product descriptions to 120+ chars of concrete, quotable substance.
Serve real HTML without JavaScript: agent fetchers read the raw response. Pre-render or SSR your storefront.
Fill the four required catalog fields on every product: title, image, price, description — a product missing one drops out of agent answers.
Publish shipping + returns policy pages at stable URLs — agents surface (and protocols require) merchant policies before completing checkout.
Add /llms.txt — a short markdown map of your key pages for AI systems (llmstxt.org).

platform.name: magento
platform.evidence: Magento markers; no default agentic-checkout rail detected.

fixes: Expose a machine-readable product catalog. On Shopify keep /products.json open; elsewhere publish a product feed agents can parse.
Move onto (or integrate) an agentic-checkout rail: Shopify stores ride ChatGPT checkout + Google catalog rails; custom stacks need a direct ACP integration.
Publish shipping + returns policy pages at stable URLs — agents surface (and protocols require) merchant policies before completing checkout.
Add /llms.txt — a short markdown map of your key pages for AI systems (llmstxt.org).

fixes: Expose a machine-readable product catalog. On Shopify keep /products.json open; elsewhere publish a product feed agents can parse.
Move onto (or integrate) an agentic-checkout rail: Shopify stores ride ChatGPT checkout + Google catalog rails; custom stacks need a direct ACP integration.
Publish shipping + returns policy pages at stable URLs — agents surface (and protocols require) merchant policies before completing checkout.
Publish /sitemap.xml (and declare it in robots.txt) so agents can enumerate your catalog.
Serve real HTML without JavaScript: agent fetchers read the raw response. Pre-render or SSR your storefront.
Add /llms.txt — a short markdown map of your key pages for AI systems (llmstxt.org).

Publish /sitemap.xml (and declare it in robots.txt) so agents can enumerate your catalog.

fixes: Expose a machine-readable product catalog. On Shopify keep /products.json open; elsewhere publish a product feed agents can parse.
Serve real HTML without JavaScript: agent fetchers read the raw response. Pre-render or SSR your storefront.

pillars.label: Discover — can agents fetch + read the store?

checks.label: AI crawlers allowed (robots.txt)
checks.detail: No robots.txt — nothing blocks AI crawlers (open by default).

checks.label: llms.txt present
checks.detail: No /llms.txt (emerging convention — counted as a soft gap, not a blocker).

checks.label: Sitemap discoverable
checks.detail: No sitemap found at /sitemap.xml or declared in robots.txt.

checks.label: Homepage readable without JavaScript
checks.detail: Homepage fetch failed (https://solostove.com/: HTTP 403).

pillars.label: Evaluate — can agents parse + trust the products?

checks.label: Machine-readable product catalog
checks.detail: No open product feed detected (catalog endpoint closed or absent). No product URL was discoverable to sample, so page-level schema is unverified.

checks.label: Catalog required fields (title/image/price/description)
checks.detail: No open feed to sample.

checks.label: Title quality (literal, matchable)
checks.detail: No open feed to sample.

checks.label: Description depth (≥120 chars)
checks.detail: No open feed to sample.

checks.label: Product JSON-LD (Offer: price/currency/availability)
checks.detail: No product page fetched.

pillars.label: Transact — can an agent complete a purchase?

checks.label: Agentic-checkout rail (platform prerequisite)
checks.detail: Platform: custom/unknown. No known platform markers — agentic checkout would need a direct protocol integration (e.g. ACP).

checks.label: Machine-readable price + availability
checks.detail: No feed or product page available.

checks.label: Shipping + returns policies discoverable
checks.detail: Shipping policy not found · returns/refund policy not found.

platform.name: custom/unknown
platform.evidence: No known platform markers — agentic checkout would need a direct protocol integration (e.g. ACP).

fixes: Serve real HTML without JavaScript: agent fetchers read the raw response. Pre-render or SSR your storefront.
Expose a machine-readable product catalog. On Shopify keep /products.json open; elsewhere publish a product feed agents can parse.
Move onto (or integrate) an agentic-checkout rail: Shopify stores ride ChatGPT checkout + Google catalog rails; custom stacks need a direct ACP integration.
Publish shipping + returns policy pages at stable URLs — agents surface (and protocols require) merchant policies before completing checkout.
Publish /sitemap.xml (and declare it in robots.txt) so agents can enumerate your catalog.
Add /llms.txt — a short markdown map of your key pages for AI systems (llmstxt.org).

checks.label: Sitemap discoverable
checks.detail: Sitemap found.

checks.label: Homepage readable without JavaScript
checks.detail: Homepage serves ~578 visible words of real HTML (no JS needed).

Move onto (or integrate) an agentic-checkout rail: Shopify stores ride ChatGPT checkout + Google catalog rails; custom stacks need a direct ACP integration.
Publish shipping + returns policy pages at stable URLs — agents surface (and protocols require) merchant policies before completing checkout.
Publish /sitemap.xml (and declare it in robots.txt) so agents can enumerate your catalog.
Add /llms.txt — a short markdown map of your key pages for AI systems (llmstxt.org).
